name: macf-agent
description: Multi-Agent Coordination Framework — channel server, runtime skills, agent definitions, and hooks for coordinating Claude Code agents via mTLS and GitHub. v0.2.0+ runs the channel server via npx dispatch (DR-022). v0.2.1 added the type:'mcp_tool' Stop hook invoking notify_peer (DR-023 UC-1, groundnuty/macf#256). v0.2.2 fixes the Stop hook server reference to use the plugin-namespaced mount path 'plugin:macf-agent:macf-agent' (Claude Code 2.1.x mounts plugin-provided MCP servers under that prefix; bare 'macf-agent' resolves only against global registry).
